metrolink: On Thursday 11th and Friday 12th June The Weeknd plays at Etihad Stadium. Services will be busier than usual so please plan your journey in advance.

crew_quote: "With this weather, I reckon a nice hot curry is the perfect way to heat things up, unless you're waiting for memory production to triple — that could take a lifetime!"
